goal: Phase 2 source/catalog snapshot model for Orun (component catalog)
next_focus: Scope Task 0026 (C2 PR-2: infer + deps + validate + manifestHash) on top of merged catalogresolve discover/load/inherit. Fold the spec-proposal wording from ai/proposals/task-0025-spec-update.md into the Task 0026 prompt PR-Boundary text so additive sibling files in internal/catalogmodel/ remain explicitly permitted.
notes: Phase 2 Milestone C0 ✅ shipped via PR #168 (squash 7f3f2bf) on 2026-05-31. internal/catalogmodel + sourcectx skeleton, canonical encoder, JSON Schema generator + verify-generated drift gate, golden roundtrip, T-IDK-1/3/5 property tests. Verifier hardened Makefile with package-level ≥90% gates after spotting an 81.7% catalogmodel ship.

Phase 2 Milestone C1 ✅ shipped via PR #169 (squash b50d799) on 2026-05-31. internal/sourcectx resolver online — ResolveSourceSnapshot(ctx, opts) populates headRevision/treeHash/dirtyHash/catalogInputHash via injected Git/Clock/Filesystem adapters. Verifier-attached fix: TestCanonicalEncodeStringEscapeBranches in internal/catalogmodel/coverage_test.go pinned the C0 catalogmodel coverage floor deterministically (rapid-driven property tests were probabilistically missing \b/\f escape branches in writeQuotedString, dropping coverage from 90.2% to 87.9% on some seeds). Post-fix coverage on main: catalogmodel 91.1%, sourcectx 91.1%, Sanitize* 100%; Phase 1 floors held.

Active milestone: C2 (orun-component-catalog implementation-plan.md §C2). Spec suggests 2 PRs: (a) discover + load + inherit ✅ shipped Task 0025 / PR #170 (squash 723be32) on 2026-05-31; (b) infer + deps + validate + manifestHash → Task 0026 (next).

Phase 2 Milestone C2 PR-1 ✅ shipped via PR #170 (squash 723be32) on 2026-05-31. internal/catalogresolve online — DiscoverAndLoad(ctx, Options) walks workspace, loads + schema-validates authored component manifests, applies intent-defaults inheritance, returns deterministic []AuthoredManifest with RFC 6901 provenance. Phase 2 floors: catalogmodel 91.1%, sourcectx 91.1%, catalogresolve 90.0% (exact gate, stable across 3 local + CI runs, deterministic — no rapid). Phase 1 floors held byte-for-byte. Verifier accepted both implementer call-outs: (1) additive internal/catalogmodel/schema_embed.go ACCEPT — convention adopted: 'one additive file per cross-package contract surface in catalogmodel/, no edits to existing files, embed-only or read-only typed view'. Spec proposal at ai/proposals/task-0025-spec-update.md tightens the C2 PR-Boundary wording for Task 0026 onward. (2) catalogresolve 90.0% no-headroom ACCEPT WITH RISK NOTE — deterministic, no flake; Task 0026 PR-2 should naturally raise the floor as more resolver machinery lands.

C3+ roadmap: C3 = CatalogSnapshot + graph builder + catalogHash; C4 = catalogstore Writer/Resolver atomic writes; C5 = catalog CLI; C6 = orun plan integration; C7 = orun run integration + history events; C8 = catalogdiff/validate/rebuild; C9 = catalogsync seam (Syncer interface + NoopSyncer ONLY — no HTTP, no auth, no DB schema).
Phase 2 is local-only. No HTTP, no SaaS, no DB schema. internal/catalogsync ships only the Syncer interface and a NoopSyncer.
Phase 1 invariants preserved: do not rename Phase 1 fields, do not lower coverage floors, do not remove preserved CLI workflows.

Carry-forward (deferred from Phase 1, candidates for follow-on within Phase 2 scope): MirrorModeHardlink debug-fold decision, RunnerHooks.AfterStateUpdate async-mirror evaluation, --persist-revision flag wiring, Option B trigger-name resolver branch (ai/proposals/task-0019-spec-update.md), --prune-legacy.
